rationale: In the citing paper, Chae, Bruno, and Feinberg (2019) is cited mainly as part of grouped background references to support the general idea that repeated ads can cause wearout/annoyance. It is not used as a specific model, method, or empirical benchmark that the paper directly builds on in its core game-theoretic analysis. A later mention appears in a future-research remark about heterogeneous wearout sensitivity, which still functions as a peripheral literature pointer rather than a direct intellectual dependency.
